name: suede_cover
description: Suede Labs style cover service for agents, producers, DJs, music supervisors, content creators, brand teams, sync coordinators, and AI music pipelines that need to re-render an existing track in a new genre, era, or production aesthetic while preserving the underlying composition. Supports genre-flip remixes (acoustic to EDM, hip-hop to orchestral, indie to synthwave), era-shift covers (80s, 90s, lo-fi, future bass), brand mood retunes for ad placements, alternate-mix delivery for streaming variants, sync alt-cuts for film and game, and paid x402/ACP agent commerce workflows. Input is either a Suede track_id or public audio URL plus a style prompt describing the target aesthetic; output is a new audio URL of the cover plus detected key, tempo, and style metadata. Powered by the Suede pipeline with composition-preserving style transfer.

track_id.description: Suede Labs track identifier of a previously generated or registered track. Either track_id or audio_url is required.

audio_url.description: Public HTTP(S) URL of the source audio file to cover. Supports mp3, wav, flac, m4a, and ogg up to 8 minutes long. Either track_id or audio_url is required.

style_prompt.description: Target style or genre description. Examples: 'acoustic folk ballad', '80s synthwave', 'lo-fi hip-hop bedroom mix', 'orchestral cinematic'.

preserve_vocals.description: When true, attempts to keep the original vocal performance and re-render only the instrumental bed. When false, regenerates the full arrangement.

examples.style_prompt: 80s synthwave with gated reverb drums and analog pads
acoustic folk ballad with fingerpicked guitar
